title: LCID Stock Quote Price and Forecast
text: CNN Money provides real-time stock quotes and price forecasts for Lucid Group. Current stock price reflects depressed valuation following Q1 2026 guidance suspension and earnings miss. The quote page shows trading volume and price trends over various time horizons. CNN's analyst consensus matches broader market view of Hold rating with mixed sentiment. The forecast suggests limited near-term upside with material downside risks if guidance and execution worsen further. Price movements track closely with earnings announcements and funding news, indicating sentiment remains highly sensitive to operational developments.
